title: Clan Beruss
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Clan Beruss''' was one of the Five Oligarchic Families of [[Illodia]], with a branch having moved to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They were known for trying to never show any emotions. The Beruss family also contributed many of Illodia's [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Old]], [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial]], and [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senates]].

==Members==
*[[Doman Beruss (elder)]], a distant member of the family
**[[Doman Beruss (Corellian)]], [[Gender/Legends|female]] Corellian [[Senator/Legends|senator]]
***[[Doman Beruss (Illodian)]], her nephew, [[Gender/Legends|male]] Illodian senator
****[[Avan Beruss]], his son, male [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
